name: firered-openstoryline
description: FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI video editing agent that transforms manual editing into intention-driven directing through natural language interaction, LLM-powered planning, and precise tool orchestration. It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.
readme:
# FireRedTeam/FireRed-OpenStoryline

FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI video editing agent that transforms manual editing into intention-driven directing through natural language interaction, LLM-powered planning, and precise tool orchestration. It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.
readmeHtml:
FireRedTeam/FireRed-OpenStoryline

FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI video editing agent that transforms manual editing into intention-driven directing through natural language interaction, LLM-powered planning, and precise tool orchestration. It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.
